---
title: "Visualizing Granular Land Cover Drivers"
author: "Jeronimo Rodriguez-Escobar"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
---

## Overview

Quick inspection of the granular land cover change metrics generated by `LC_change_granular.qmd`.

```{r setup, message=false, warning=false}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
library(viridis)

# Load paths
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
source(here::here("R", "paths.R"))
devtools::load_all(quiet = TRUE)
```

## Load Data

```{r load}
gpkg_path <- file.path(data_dir(), "processed", "10k_lcc_granular_metrics.gpkg")

if (!file.exists(gpkg_path)) {
  stop("Data not found. Run analysis/LC_change_granular.qmd first.")
}

df <- st_read(gpkg_path, quiet = TRUE)

# Filter out Antarctica for plotting
if ("continent" %in% names(df)) {
  df <- df %>% filter(continent != "Antarctica")
}
```

## 1. Forest Loss (Gross Loss)

Visualizing where Forest has transitioned to Non-Forest (1992-2020).

```{r plot-forest-loss, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# Column: ForestLoss_Loss_Forest_1992_2020
col_forest <- "ForestLoss_Loss_Forest_1992_2020"

if (col_forest %in% names(df)) {
  ggplot(df) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = .data[[col_forest]]), color = NA) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma", direction = -1, name = "% Loss") +
    labs(title = "Gross Forest Loss (1992-2020)",
         subtitle = "Percentage of 10km cell converted from Forest to Non-Forest") +
    theme_minimal()
} else {
  message("Forest loss column not found.")
}
```

## 2. Urban Expansion

Visualizing where Non-Urban land has transitioned to Urban.

```{r plot-urban, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# Column: Expansion_Gain_Urban_1992_2020
col_urban <- "Expansion_Gain_Urban_1992_2020"

if (col_urban %in% names(df)) {
  # Filter to show only areas with some expansion for better contrast
  df_urban <- df %>% filter(.data[[col_urban]] > 0.1)

  ggplot(df_urban) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = .data[[col_urban]]), color = NA) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "inferno", name = "% Gain") +
    labs(title = "Urban Expansion (1992-2020)",
         subtitle = "Percentage of 10km cell converted to Urban") +
    theme_minimal()
} else {
  message("Urban gain column not found.")
}
```

## 3. Cropland Expansion

Visualizing transitions to Cropland.

```{r plot-crop, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# Column: Expansion_Gain_Cropland_1992_2020
col_crop <- "Expansion_Gain_Cropland_1992_2020"

if (col_crop %in% names(df)) {
  ggplot(df) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = .data[[col_crop]]), color = NA) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = "% Gain") +
    labs(title = "Cropland Expansion (1992-2020)",
         subtitle = "Percentage of 10km cell converted to Cropland") +
    theme_minimal()
} else {
  message("Cropland gain column not found.")
}
```
